---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the workflow you want to enable?

Be concrete. "I want to type X and have Y happen because Z."

## Why isn't an existing command enough?

If `wdm` could already do this with the right pipe, show the pipeline.

## Proposed CLI surface

```sh
wdm <new-thing> <args>
```

## Anything else?

Edge cases, related tools, prior art.
